quotes.text: Discipline is the bridge between goals and accomplishment.
quotes.author: Jim Rohn

quotes.text: We are what we repeatedly do. Excellence, then, is not an act, but a habit.
quotes.author: Aristotle

quotes.text: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
quotes.author: Mark Twain

quotes.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: Waste no more time arguing about what a good man should be. Be one.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: You have power over your mind, not outside events. Realize this, and you will find strength.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: The obstacle is the way.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: Concentrate all your thoughts upon the work in hand. The sun's rays do not burn until brought to a focus.
quotes.author: Alexander Graham Bell

quotes.text: Hard work beats talent when talent doesn't work hard.
quotes.author: Tim Notke

quotes.text: The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.
quotes.author: Confucius

quotes.text: First say to yourself what you would be; and then do what you have to do.
quotes.author: Epictetus

quotes.text: Luck is what happens when preparation meets opportunity.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text: Deep work is the ability to focus without distraction on a cognitively demanding task.
quotes.author: Cal Newport

quotes.text: The successful warrior is the average man, with laser-like focus.
quotes.author: Bruce Lee

quotes.text: Do not wait; the time will never be just right. Start where you stand.
quotes.author: Napoleon Hill

quotes.text: Small daily improvements are the key to staggering long-term results.
quotes.author: Robin Sharma

quotes.text: Genius is one percent inspiration and ninety-nine percent perspiration.
quotes.author: Thomas Edison

quotes.text: Be tolerant with others and strict with yourself.
quotes.author: Marcus Aurelius

quotes.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
quotes.author: Steve Jobs

quotes.text: Consistency is what transforms average into excellence.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: A year from now you will wish you had started today.
quotes.author: Karen Lamb

quotes.text: The pain of discipline is far less than the pain of regret.
quotes.author: Sarah Bombell

quotes.text: What you do today can improve all your tomorrows.
quotes.author: Ralph Marston

quotes.text: Difficulties strengthen the mind, as labor does the body.
quotes.author: Seneca

quotes.text: It always seems impossible until it is done.
quotes.author: Nelson Mandela

quotes.text: Focus on being productive instead of being busy.
quotes.author: Tim Ferriss

quotes.text: The quality of your work is determined by the depth of your focus.
quotes.author: Cal Newport

quotes.text: Self-control is strength. Right thought is mastery. Calmness is power.
quotes.author: James Allen

quotes.text: Do what is hard and your life will be easy.
quotes.author: Unknown

quotes.text: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
quotes.author: Robert Collier
